description:
To properly set the group owner of /var/log/gdm/*, run the command: 
$ sudo chgrp gdm /var/log/gdm/*
or 
$ sudo chgrp root /var/log/gdm/*
rationale:
The <tt>/var/log/gdm</tt> directory contains information about the GDM daemon
and should only be accessed by authorized personnel.
ocil_clause:
/var/log/gdm/* does not have a group owner of
gdm or
root
ocil:
To check the group ownership of /var/log/gdm/*, run the command: 
$ ls -lL /var/log/gdm/*
If properly configured, the output should indicate the following group-owner: gdm or root
title: Verify Groupownership of Files in /var/log/gdm
